notes: Holding defensive into the Fed rate decision with inflation at a 3-year high and Warsh's debut as the dominant event risk; VIX calm at 16.4 but day P&L -$29k and a split tape (chip rollover) confirm fading breadth. No reason to re-risk before the decision prints.
journal_entry: Nudged 0.45 to 0.40 — still neutral and defensive ahead of the Fed. Tape stayed soft (AMD -7.1%, ROKU -5.0%, CRVO -13.7%), oil down on US-Iran framework helps AAL/airlines but I'm not chasing. Same avoids: parabolic MTEN, AMC dilution, CLOV insider sales, AAPL extended, BFLY Jun 18 event. Waiting on the rate outcome before re-risking.
